name: fuel-price-dynamic
jsonPath:
'⛽ ' + $.data.region + ' 今日油价
' + '📈 趋势: ' + $.data.trend.direction + '｜⏰ 调整: ' + $.data.trend.next_adjustment_date + '
' + '💡 预估: ' + $.data.trend.change_liter_desc + '
' + lines($.data.items,'🔹 {name}: {price_desc}') + '
' + '🕒 更新: ' + $.data.updated

name: realtime-weather
jsonPath:
'🌤️ ' + $.data.location.name + ' 实时天气
' + '☁️ 天气: ' + $.data.weather.condition + '  ' + $.data.weather.temperature + '℃
' + '💧 湿度: ' + $.data.weather.humidity + '%
' + '🌬️ 风向: ' + $.data.weather.wind_direction + ' ' + $.data.weather.wind_power + '
' + '😷 空气: AQI ' + $.data.air_quality.aqi + '（' + $.data.air_quality.quality + '）
' + '🌅 日出/日落: ' + $.data.sunrise.sunrise_desc + ' / ' + $.data.sunrise.sunset_desc + '
' + '🕒 更新: ' + $.data.weather.updated

name: weather-forecast-with-days
jsonPath:
'🛰️ ' + $.data.location.name + ' 天气预报
' + '🌅日出/🌇日落: ' + $.data.sunrise_sunset[0].sunrise_desc + ' / ' + $.data.sunrise_sunset[0].sunset_desc + '
' + '📆 预报详情:
' + lines($.data.daily_forecast,'🔹 {date}  {day_condition}/{night_condition}  
🔹 🌡️{min_temperature}~{max_temperature}℃  💨{day_wind_direction}{day_wind_power}  😷AQI {aqi}({air_quality})')

name: weather-forecast-default-days
jsonPath:
'🛰️ ' + $.data.location.name + ' 天气预报
' + '🌅日出/🌇日落: ' + $.data.sunrise_sunset[0].sunrise_desc + ' / ' + $.data.sunrise_sunset[0].sunset_desc + '
' + '📆 预报详情:
' + lines($.data.daily_forecast,'🔹 {date}  {day_condition}/{night_condition}  
🔹 🌡️{min_temperature}~{max_temperature}℃  💨{day_wind_direction}{day_wind_power}  😷AQI {aqi}({air_quality})')

name: health-analysis
keyword: 健康分析|身体健康分析
jsonPath:
'🧬 身体健康分析报告
' + '👤 ' + $.data.basic_info.gender_desc + '｜' + $.data.basic_info.age_desc + '｜' + $.data.basic_info.height_desc + '｜' + $.data.basic_info.weight_desc + '
' + '📏 BMI: ' + $.data.bmi.value_desc + '（' + $.data.bmi.category_desc + '）
' + '⚖️ 体重状态: ' + $.data.weight_assessment.status_desc + '，' + $.data.weight_assessment.adjustment_desc + '
' + '🔥 BMR: ' + $.data.metabolism.bmr_desc + '｜TDEE: ' + $.data.metabolism.tdee_desc + '
' + '🥗 建议摄入: ' + $.data.metabolism.recommended_calories_desc + '
' + '💧 饮水: ' + $.data.health_advice.daily_water_intake_desc + '
' + '🏃 运动: ' + $.data.health_advice.exercise_recommendation_desc + '
' + '🍽️ 营养: ' + $.data.health_advice.nutrition_advice_desc + '
' + '💡 提示: ' + join($.data.health_advice.health_tips,'；') + '
' + '📌 免责声明: ' + $.data.disclaimer

name: dailyhot-by-title
highspeed-ticket-query
keyword: 高铁票查询|动车票查询|车票查询
jsonPath:
'🚄 ' + $.from + ' → ' + $.to + ' 车票查询
' + '📅 日期: ' + $.time + '
' + '📌 状态: ' + $.msg + '（code=' + $.code + '）
' + '📊 共 ' + $.count + ' 趟（当前显示前 10 条）
' + '──────────
' + lines(take($.data,10), '{index}. {trainumber}｜{traintype}｜{departtime}-{arrivetime}（{runtime}）
   {departstation} → {arrivestation}', '
')

name: highspeed-ticket-paging
jsonPath:
'🚄 ' + $.from + ' → ' + $.to + ' 车票查询（第 ' + $__params.page + ' 页）
' + '📅 日期: ' + $.time + '
' + '📌 状态: ' + $.msg + '（code=' + $.code + '）
' + '📊 共 ' + $.count + ' 趟（每页 10 条）
' + '──────────
' + lines(page($.data,$.__params.page,10), '{index}. {trainumber}｜{traintype}｜{departtime}-{arrivetime}（{runtime}）
   {departstation} → {arrivestation}', '
')

name: highspeed-ticket-detail
jsonPath:
'🚆 车票详情：' + $.__params.trainnumber + '
' + '📍 ' + $.from + ' → ' + $.to + '
' + '📅 日期: ' + $.time + '
' + '──────────
' + '类型: ' + get(pick($.data,"trainumber",$.__params.trainnumber),"traintype") + '
' + '车次: ' + get(pick($.data,"trainumber",$.__params.trainnumber),"trainumber") + '
' + '出发: ' + get(pick($.data,"trainumber",$.__params.trainnumber),"departstation") + ' ' + get(pick($.data,"trainumber",$.__params.trainnumber),"departtime") + '
' + '到达: ' + get(pick($.data,"trainumber",$.__params.trainnumber),"arrivestation") + ' ' + get(pick($.data,"trainumber",$.__params.trainnumber),"arrivetime") + '
' + '历时: ' + get(pick($.data,"trainumber",$.__params.trainnumber),"runtime") + '
' + '🎫 座位余票:
' + lines(get(pick($.data,"trainumber",$.__params.trainnumber),"ticket_info"), '{seatname}: {bookable}｜¥{seatprice}｜余票 {seatinventory}', '
')

name: fabing-default
keyword: 随机发病文学|发病文学

name: proxy-api-debug-link
pattern: ^(?:接口调试链接|代理调试链接|debug-link)\s+(https?:\/\/\S+)$
linkDescription: 点击打开代理后的调试链接
